title: Living in the Van Vlog 1-6-2012 (well as a refugee though)

transcript.text: Hello, living in a van, refugee, V-Log.
I am over at my YouTube friend's house,
And we're just getting stoned and exchanging cool YouTube videos and stuff,
And channels and stuff.
And, uh, yeah.
And, uh, I rented, um, I got a whole last season of The Tudors,
So I'm gonna watch that at night, that's kind of fun.
Uh, oh, the mechanic called me yesterday,
And he says that there is water coming out of the engine,
But he doesn't know if it's the big problem,
Where the gaskets are busted,
Or the cylinders scratch or something,
Until today.
So he'll call me today.
And that's what I did yesterday.
I took the bus all the way down to Seattle
And, uh, across over to Bremerton,
And it's, uh, yeah, it's really, it's really rainy,
So I'm just on the computer all day,
Hanging out on the Internet,
Working on the site a little bit.
And, uh, yeah, that's that.
All right.
All right.
Thank you.
Thank you.
Thank you.
Thank you.
Thank you.
